Clindamycin Hydrochloride (Oral Capsules): Risk of Oesophagitis and Oesophageal Ulcer Mesalazine: Risk of Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension (IIH) Moxifloxacin: Drug Reaction with Eosinophilia and Systemic Symptoms (DRESS), Fixed-Drug Eruption (FDE), and Photosensitivity Associated with Systemic Use Sunitinib: Risk of Hyperammonaemic Encephalopathy Denosumab (Prolia®) and Biosimilars: Multi Vertebral Fractures (MVF) after Discontinuation of Denosumab – Strengthened Warnings Palbociclib: Risk of Venous Thromboembolism Linezolid: Risk of Rhabdomyolysis Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine): Risk of Peripheral Neuropathy
